title: Indulgent Canadian Pineapple Fritters
description: A sweet and indulgent Canadian dish featuring pineapple, with a nutty and glassy-jelly texture, served in an agave leaf vessel. This gluten-free friendly treat is perfect for any occasion.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the almond flour, coconut sugar, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and vanilla extract.
Add the egg mixture to the dry ingredients and stir until combined.
Add the pineapple rings to the batter and stir until they are fully coated.
Fry the pineapple rings in batches until they are golden brown.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve in agave leaves.
Garnish with additional coconut sugar and pineapple wedges if desired.
